title: rosa × polliniana var. kalksburgensis
intro: Rosa × polliniana var. kalksburgensis, also known as Kalksburg rose or Rosa × polliniana 'Kalksburgensis', is a type of rose plant that is a hybrid of Rosa polyantha and Rosa rugosa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high content of salicylic acid. The health benefits of Rosa × polliniana var. kalksburgensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
